name: @xiigen/event-attendance
description: FLOW-04 event-attendance - attendee RSVP, waitlist promotion, check-in, cancellation, and feedback-window lifecycle (T63-T67). Portability artifact declaring cross-flow co-install relationships.

emitsEventsConsumedBy: FLOW-09 (RsvpConfirmed and RsvpCancelled -> transactional event participation)
readsFromOtherFlows: FLOW-03 (EventCreated and event records -> RSVP, waitlist, and check-in lifecycle)

coInstallNotes: FLOW-04 depends on FLOW-03 event-management for event source records and event lifecycle signals. FLOW-03 remains bootable without FLOW-04; FLOW-04 must declare FLOW-03 as a co-install before tenant fork certification.
